user_intent: Maintain semantic stability across long human-AI interaction loops without modifying the model.

turns.content: Keep the discussion anchored on trajectory-level semantic stability.
I will keep the dialogue focused on semantic stability, drift signals, and external observability.
Add complementarity and explain how human agency remains preserved.
Complementarity measures balance between human steering and AI structural support without overriding the user.
Now relate this to sovereignty gate logic.
The sovereignty gate monitors when drift or instability rises and routes intervention toward explanation, reanchoring, or human review.
